sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86812" key="probia/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προβῐάζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n86812.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">force</tr_> a measure <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">through,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:72" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.72</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
